_fixture_notice: FIXTURE. Synthetic cached EMA SmPC extract in the DECLARED shape accepted by analysis/label_adapters.py::parse_ema_product_information. That shape is NOT verified against a live EMA response (EMA_ADAPTER_STATUS = shape_declared_unverified_against_live_source) — see 04_PKPD/METHODS.md, Limitations. Invented product; no real claim.

items: FIXTURE: Hypersensitivity to the fixture active substance or to any of the fixture excipients.

sections.section_title: Special warnings and precautions for use
items: FIXTURE: Fixture neutropenia has been observed; monitor fixture blood counts.
FIXTURE: Fixture enzyme-inducing antiseizure medicinal products may reduce fixturib plasma concentrations.
